purpose: Task tracker that keeps teams focused and accountable, with mandatory readiness checklists before tasks can be closed and two-way Jira sync
features: Task board with assignments, deadlines, and status tracking
Readiness checklists -- mandatory completion before closing tasks
Multi-project support with per-project task organization
Manager dashboard with project health, deadlines at risk, completion rates
Two-way Jira sync -- tasks stay in sync between DeliverIt and Jira

users.description: Internal team plus managers and leads

roles.name: Super Admin
roles.description: Full system access, manages users and roles

roles.name: Manager
roles.description: Assign tasks, set deadlines, view dashboards, manage projects

roles.name: User
roles.description: View assigned tasks, update status, complete readiness checklists

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: Project health overview, deadlines at risk, task completion rates

pages.name: Projects
pages.description: List all projects with status, progress, and team count

pages.name: Project Detail
pages.description: Tasks within a project, progress bar, team members, Jira sync status

pages.name: Tasks
pages.description: All tasks across projects with filters by project, assignee, status, deadline

pages.name: Task Detail
pages.description: Full task view with readiness checklist, comments, Jira link, history

pages.name: Role Management
pages.description: Create custom roles, permission matrix editor

mock_services.name: mock-oidc
mock_services.purpose: Local OIDC identity provider for Azure AD simulation

mock_services.name: mock-jira
mock_services.purpose: Simulates Jira REST API for two-way task sync
